title: AGENTOBS RedactPayload
description: RFC-0001 §7.2, §12 — Payload for PII/PHI detection and redaction audit events in the llm.redact.* namespace. These events form the audit trail proving that redaction occurred before data crossed a trust boundary (§12.4). Three event types: llm.redact.pii.detected (PII categories found in a field), llm.redact.phi.detected (PHI found), llm.redact.applied (redaction policy was applied, removing sensitive values). CRITICAL: redacted content MUST NOT appear in these events — only field names, category labels, and counts.

RedactPiiDetectedPayload.title: RedactPiiDetectedPayload
RedactPiiDetectedPayload.description: Payload for llm.redact.pii.detected — PII (Personally Identifiable Information) categories were found in one or more event fields. Emitted before redaction occurs.

detected_categories.description: RFC-0001 §12.1 — PII categories detected. Use standardised category names (e.g. NIST SP 800-188 or ISO 29101 terminology).

field_names.description: Names of the fields in which PII was detected. MUST NOT include field values.

sensitivity_level.description: RFC-0001 §12.1 — Highest sensitivity level present across all detected PII categories.

detection_count.description: Total number of PII instances detected across all fields and categories.

detector.description: Identifier of the PII detection system or library.

subject_event_id.description: ULID of the event containing the detected PII.

RedactPhiDetectedPayload.title: RedactPhiDetectedPayload
RedactPhiDetectedPayload.description: Payload for llm.redact.phi.detected — PHI (Protected Health Information, HIPAA-regulated) categories were found. Warrant stricter treatment than PII alone (§20.2).

field_names.description: Names of the fields containing PHI. MUST NOT include field values.

sensitivity_level.description: RFC-0001 §12.1 — For PHI events this MUST always be 'PHI'.

detection_count.description: Total number of PHI instances detected.

detector.description: Identifier of the PHI detection system.

subject_event_id.description: ULID of the event containing the detected PHI.

hipaa_covered.description: Whether the originating data store or pipeline is covered by a HIPAA Business Associate Agreement.

RedactAppliedPayload.title: RedactAppliedPayload
RedactAppliedPayload.description: Payload for llm.redact.applied — a RedactionPolicy was applied, replacing sensitive values with '[REDACTED by <redacted_by>]' strings before the event was exported (§12.3, §12.4).

policy_min_sensitivity.description: RFC-0001 §12.3 — The min_sensitivity threshold of the RedactionPolicy that was applied. Fields at or above this level were redacted.

redacted_by.description: RFC-0001 §12.3 — Label used as the 'redacted_by' value in replacement strings: '[REDACTED by <redacted_by>]'.

redacted_count.description: Total number of field values that were replaced.

redacted_field_names.description: Names of the fields that were redacted. MUST NOT include original or redacted values.

subject_event_id.description: ULID of the event that was redacted.

verified.description: Whether post-redaction verification (§12.5 assert_redacted) confirmed no residual sensitive content remains in the event.
